subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-12 in London
subcodes.first_line: In this Cause, all humanity is regarded as a single family, and the whole earth accounted as one country
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این امر جمعیّت بشر یک عائله و کرّهٴ ارض یکوطن است
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
